title: Fortran program for simulating the Kauffman model with multiple containers and spatially separated ligation and cleavage processes
author: Johannes Schneider
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The file copolymer.f contains a Fortran77 program (using Fortran8.x extensions) simulating the Kauffman model in a large number of containers, connected by diffusion processes, with spatially separated ligation and cleavage processes. For further information, see the file readme.txt and the comments in copolymer.f
steps_raw: The file copolymer.f contains a Fortran77 program (using Fortran8.x extensions) simulating the Kauffman model in a large number of containers, connected by diffusion processes, with spatially separated ligation and cleavage processes. For further information, see the file readme.txt and the comments in copolymer.f
keywords: Kauffman model, chemical evolution, origin of life
